tier1.title: Arrays & Strings Fundamentals
tier1.description: Master arrays and strings. Learn memory layout, indexing, and common patterns.

tier1.title: Array Manipulation Patterns
tier1.description: Sliding window, two pointers, and prefix sum patterns for interview success.

tier1.title: Linked Lists Fundamentals
tier1.description: Understand linked lists, node structures, and when to use them over arrays.

tier1.title: Stacks & Queues
tier1.description: LIFO and FIFO data structures with real-world applications and problems.

tier1.title: Hash Maps & Hash Sets
tier1.description: O(1) lookups, collision handling, and common interview patterns.

tier1.title: Binary Trees Fundamentals
tier1.description: Tree structure, traversals (inorder, preorder, postorder, level-order), and key properties.

tier1.title: Tree Traversal Patterns
tier1.description: Advanced traversal techniques and path-finding patterns in trees.

tier1.title: Graph Fundamentals
tier1.description: Graph types, representations, and basic graph algorithms.

tier1.title: Depth-First Search (DFS)
tier1.description: DFS implementation, patterns, and use cases for path-finding and connectivity.

tier1.title: Breadth-First Search (BFS)
tier1.description: BFS implementation for shortest path and level-order traversal.

tier1.title: Complexity Analysis Deep Dive
tier1.description: Big O notation, time/space complexity, and practical optimization limits.

tier1.title: Interview Patterns & Cheat Sheet
tier1.description: 10 essential patterns that solve 80% of interview problems with templates and examples.

tier2.title: Binary Search Trees (BST)
tier2.description: BST operations (search, insert, delete), validation, and applications.

tier2.title: Heaps & Priority Queues
tier2.description: Heap operations, priority queues, and top-k problems.

tier2.title: Dynamic Programming Fundamentals
tier2.description: DP concepts, memoization vs tabulation, and classic DP problems.

tier2.title: Advanced DP: State Machine
tier2.description: Multi-state DP for complex constraints (stock trading, cooldown).

tier2.title: Advanced DP: Game Theory
tier2.description: Minimax DP for two-player games and optimal play.

tier2.title: Segment Trees & Fenwick Trees
tier2.description: Range queries and updates with segment and Fenwick trees.

tier2.title: String Matching Algorithms
tier2.description: KMP, Rabin-Karp, and Boyer-Moore pattern matching.

tier2.title: Bit Manipulation
tier2.description: Bitwise operations and common bit manipulation tricks.

tier2.title: Sliding Window Advanced
tier2.description: Monotonic deque and multi-pointer window techniques.

tier3.title: Graph Coloring & Bipartite
tier3.description: Graph coloring and bipartite checking algorithms.

tier3.title: Complexity Analysis Cheat Sheet
tier3.description: Quick reference for time/space complexity of algorithms and operations.

tier3.title: Algorithm Selection Guide
tier3.description: Decision tree for choosing the right algorithm for your problem.

tier3.title: LRU Cache (Advanced Data Structure)
tier3.description: Hash map + doubly linked list for O(1) cache operations.

tier3.title: Concurrency Problems (Advanced)
tier3.description: Threading, synchronization primitives, and concurrent design patterns.

tier3.title: Advanced Graph Algorithms
tier3.description: Tarjan's SCC, Kruskal's, Prim's algorithms for MST and advanced graphs.

tier3.title: Common Mistakes in Interviews
tier3.description: Avoid common coding and algorithm mistakes during interviews.

tier3.title: Code Templates for Interviews
tier3.description: Ready-to-use templates for binary search, DFS, BFS, DP, backtracking.

tier3.title: Data Structure Operations Reference
tier3.description: Quick reference for time complexity of all data structure operations.

tier3.title: Interview Communication Guide
tier3.description: How to communicate your thinking and approach during technical interviews.

tier3.title: Problem Type Recognition Guide
tier3.description: Identify problem types and match them to the right algorithms.

tier3.title: Final Interview Checklist
tier3.description: Complete checklist for interview day preparation and execution.

tier3.title: Learning Roadmap: Zero to Interview-Ready
tier3.description: 12-16 week structured learning plan with daily schedule and metrics.

fundamentals.title: System Design Fundamentals: Scalability Concepts
fundamentals.description: Master core system design concepts: scalability, availability, consistency, and CAP theorem.

fundamentals.title: Load Balancing & Distributed Systems
fundamentals.description: Distribute traffic across servers. Learn algorithms, health checks, and session management.

fundamentals.title: Database Design & Sharding Strategies
fundamentals.description: Design scalable databases. Replication, sharding, indexing, and normalization strategies.

fundamentals.title: Caching Strategies & Distributed Caching
fundamentals.description: Cache-aside, write-through, write-behind patterns. Redis, Memcached, cache invalidation.

fundamentals.title: API Design & REST Principles
fundamentals.description: RESTful API design, HTTP methods, versioning, authentication, rate limiting.

fundamentals.title: Monitoring, Logging & Observability
fundamentals.description: Logs, metrics, and traces. Dashboards, alerting, on-call rotation, and observability.

caseStudies.title: System Design Case Study: URL Shortener
caseStudies.description: Design bit.ly-like URL shortening service. Base62 encoding, ID generation, caching.

caseStudies.title: System Design Case Study: Chat System
caseStudies.description: Real-time messaging system. WebSocket, message queues, presence tracking, group chats.

caseStudies.title: System Design Case Study: Video Streaming Service
caseStudies.description: Netflix-like streaming platform. Encoding, CDN, adaptive bitrate, recommendations.

caseStudies.title: System Design Case Study: Social Media Feed
caseStudies.description: Facebook/Twitter feed system. Fanout strategies, ranking algorithms, trending, search.

caseStudies.title: System Design Case Study: Ride Sharing Service
caseStudies.description: Uber-like ride sharing. Location tracking, matching algorithm, surge pricing, payments.

caseStudies.title: System Design Case Study: Recommendation System
caseStudies.description: Netflix/Amazon recommendations. Collaborative filtering, content-based, cold start, A/B testing.

caseStudies.title: System Design Case Study: Notification System
caseStudies.description: Multi-channel notifications (email, SMS, push). Batching, retry logic, user preferences.

caseStudies.title: System Design Case Study: E-Commerce Platform
caseStudies.description: Amazon-like platform. Product search, shopping cart, checkout, inventory, flash sales.

caseStudies.title: System Design Case Study: Search Engine
caseStudies.description: Google Search-like engine. Crawlers, indexing, PageRank, query processing, ranking.

caseStudies.title: System Design Case Study: Real-Time Collaboration Tool
caseStudies.description: Google Docs-like collaboration. OT/CRDT, conflict resolution, version history, offline support.

caseStudies.title: System Design Case Study: Payment System
caseStudies.description: Payment processing. Card charging, idempotency, fraud detection, PCI compliance, refunds.

caseStudies.title: System Design Case Study: File Sharing System
caseStudies.description: Dropbox-like system. Chunking, deduplication, sync, version history, sharing, trash.

caseStudies.title: System Design Case Study: Booking System
caseStudies.description: Airbnb-like booking. Availability management, concurrent booking, pricing, cancellations.

caseStudies.title: System Design Case Study: Distributed File System
caseStudies.description: HDFS architecture. Block model, replication, NameNode, fault tolerance, MapReduce.

caseStudies.title: System Design Case Study: Instagram (Photo Sharing)
caseStudies.description: Photo platform. Image optimization, CDN, timeline generation, hashtag indexing, trending.

caseStudies.title: System Design Case Study: Twitter (Distributed Tweet Service)
caseStudies.description: Tweet platform. Snowflake IDs, fanout strategies, search with Elasticsearch, trending topics.

caseStudies.title: System Design Case Study: Slack (Enterprise Messaging)
caseStudies.description: Messaging platform. WebSocket, threading, notifications, presence tracking, file sharing.

caseStudies.title: System Design Case Study: Live Streaming Service
caseStudies.description: Twitch-like streaming. RTMP ingest, HLS/DASH delivery, transcoding, adaptive bitrate, VOD.

caseStudies.title: System Design Interview Guide
caseStudies.description: How to approach system design interviews. Clarification, estimation, trade-offs, communication tips.

caseStudies.title: System Design: Rate Limiter
caseStudies.description: Rate limiting algorithms. Token bucket, sliding window, distributed implementation, tiered limits.

caseStudies.title: System Design: Key-Value Store
caseStudies.description: Distributed KV store. Sharding, consistent hashing, replication, eviction policies, persistence.

caseStudies.title: System Design: Message Queue (Kafka-like)
caseStudies.description: Message queue design. Partitioning, consumer groups, durability, ordering, exactly-once semantics.

caseStudies.title: System Design: Distributed Cache
caseStudies.description: Redis cluster. Hash slots, replication, failover, eviction, TTL, consistency models.

caseStudies.title: System Design: Analytics System (Data Warehouse)
caseStudies.description: Analytics architecture. Lambda pattern, columnar storage, star schema, real-time dashboards, data quality.
